props.ChoiceText: A death left the keys in your hand before you felt ready to turn them.
props.ChoiceBio: An inherited workshop gave you burdens, standing, and a sharper sense of duty.

0.TransitionText: Because an inherited workshop gave you burdens, standing, and a sharper sense of duty, your life stayed with tools, labor, and the discipline of making things well.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Craftsman, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because an inherited workshop gave you burdens, standing, and a sharper sense of duty, skilled work hardened into authority over other working hands.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Guildmaster, but you may remain on your current path instead.
